mapper.sql: sd.id, sd.stock_code, sd.year, sd.dividend_type, sd.cash_per_share, sd.bonus_shares_per_10, sd.transfer_shares_per_10, sd.plan_text, sd.announcement_date, sd.ex_dividend_date, sd.status, sd.created_at, d1.dict_name AS dividend_type_name, d2.dict_name AS status_name, sb.stock_name
mapper.select:
select
from stock_dividend sd left join stock_basic sb on sd.stock_code = sb.stock_code left join sys_dict d1 on sd.dividend_type = d1.dict_code and d1.dict_type = 'stock_dividend_type' left join sys_dict d2 on sd.status = d2.dict_code and d2.dict_type = 'stock_dividend_status' where sd.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into stock_dividend
stock_code, year, dividend_type, cash_per_share, bonus_shares_per_10, transfer_shares_per_10, plan_text, announcement_date, ex_dividend_date, status, created_at
#{stockCode}, #{year}, #{dividendType}, #{cashPerShare}, #{bonusSharesPer10}, #{transferSharesPer10}, #{planText}, #{announcementDate}, #{exDividendDate}, #{status}, NOW()
